title: Chased by a Dog 被狗追赶
scene: Ben在走路时被一只大狗追赶，不知道该怎么办。

lines.en: Mom, help! That dog is chasing me!
lines.zh: 妈妈，救命！那只狗在追我！

lines.en: Do not run! Stand still and do not look at it.
But I am scared! It keeps barking at me.
lines.zh: 但我害怕！它一直冲我叫。

lines.en: Slowly walk backward. Do not make sudden movements.
lines.zh: 慢慢向后退。不要有突然的动作。

lines.en: OK, I am walking backward. Is it following me?
lines.zh: 好的，我在后退。它跟着我吗？

lines.en: It is stopping now. Good job, Ben.
That was so scary. Whose dog is that?
lines.zh: 太吓人了。那是谁家的狗？

lines.en: I do not know. Stay close to me.
What should I do if a dog chases me again?
lines.zh: 如果又有狗追我该怎么办？

lines.en: Never run. Stay calm and slowly walk away.
lines.zh: 千万别跑。保持冷静，慢慢走开。
